items.summary:
1.我用忘却篇的角色打忘却主线，虽然经常失败，但是很快乐。
2.我用星辰篇的角色打忘却主线，虽然一路秒怪，但是不快乐。
3.希望官方能站在玩家的角度考虑考虑游戏的数值、机制、对策设计是否合理，是做一个好玩的游戏，还是做一个又不好玩，又不吸金的游戏。

items.title: [正面] The art, music, vocals and story are very captivat...
items.summary: The art, music, vocals and story are very captivating. That attention to detail for a roguelite card style battler really immerses you in the very Gothic environment. It is a great balance between gacha, visual novel and roguelite without leaning to far to one particular style. I like that very much.

It is a great balance between gacha, visual novel and roguelite without leaning to far to one particular style. I like that very much.

items.title: [正面] One of the best games that I have played in a whil...
items.summary: One of the best games that I have played in a while, it's amazing story and character designs is what made me love this game so much. I think everyone should give this game a chance even if you're not a fan of the Slay the Spire like combat, it's still such an enjoyable game.

items.title: [正面] Muito bom! O jogo é sensacional, tem mecanicas úni...
items.summary: Muito bom! O jogo é sensacional, tem mecanicas únicas, bastante historia e apesar de ser gacha, não é necessariamente chato. Ou seja, voce não se diverte logando todo dia no jogo. voce se diverte jogando o jogo! Ele tem muitas cartas, monstros diferentes, personagens bacanas e muita outras coisa (dando um adendo a mecanica de reliquias de slay the spire). 10/10

items.title: [正面] Delve into a world of unexplainable horrors and in...
items.summary: Delve into a world of unexplainable horrors and investigate the mysteries behind the world post-Dissolution, you are expected to experience engaging, in-depth rogue-lite card battle gameplay, with beautiful and unique art, all of these are put into a heartfelt story of ups and downs. The gacha system is quite generous, but can still be cruel because of the pity being after getting 2 non-rate up characters/cards. With that said, for the first 7 hours into the game, I was very immersed and invested in the game, the combat system, and the lore inspired by Lovecraftian works. I will continue playing on the mobile version, too.

I will continue playing on the mobile version, too.

items.title: [正面] Sometimes I fantasize about Kathigu-ra coming home...
items.summary: Sometimes I fantasize about Kathigu-ra coming home drunk and beating me until I feel numb. She kicks me in the ribs until I can hardly breathe. Then she starts to cry and apologizes, begging me to forgive her. She holds me all night as I gently cry into her t-shirt. Please help is there any hope for me

items.title: [正面] i love the vibe of this game. horror and another s...
items.summary:
i love the vibe of this game. horror and another slay the spire-like gacha that somehow, i never heard of and was released before chaos zero nightmare 😮.

the good thing about this game is that it hasnt been infiltrated by korean incels who want to self insert wherever possible and detest having characters with their own personalities and love interests, or maybe i just havent heard enough about the game nor have i gone far enough to notice it yet

i love the horror aspect but i dont like the fact that whenever something horrifying is being described, there is no visuals to go with it 😭. this is a visual novel-esque gacha, give us some type of visual. like the scene with the guy banging his head on the wall, unfazed, bleeding, suddenly turning towards us, and charging at us. i dont care if its just drawn looking like a shadow, give me some type of visual 😭

idk why but i just really like horror gachas or maybe its just the horror visual novels? czn had a good start but alas, internal turmoil and korean incels invading the game causing it to have a less than satisfactory story and direction. i really wouldve loved the original idea of czn, but we got some mid story from some director who thought itd be cool to take over the project and basically force out the original storywriter, but i digress. so far, 6 hours in, i definitely think this is a really interesting premise and story so far. my thoughts may or may not change, but we shall see. 8/10 for me for now

items.title: [正面] Beautiful artwork, lovely music, and a very fun tw...
items.summary:
Beautiful artwork, lovely music, and a very fun twist on the card battle system I was expecting from screenshots. I've barely gotten into the story but I can already see why so many people flocked to support this game and save it from an early grave. 

If you like the art, and enjoy gothic, and lovecraftian themes, I highly recommend this game.

Beautiful artwork, lovely music, and a very fun twist on the card battle system I was expecting from screenshots. I've barely gotten into the story but I can already see why so many people flocked to support this game and save it from an early grave. 

If you like the art, and enjoy gothic, and lovecraftian themes, I highly recommend this game.

items.title: [负面] 就是一个垃圾游戏，忘却此游戏吧。然后设计者麻烦将这个数学题破解一下：纳维-斯托克斯方程存在性与光滑性...
items.summary:
就是一个垃圾游戏，忘却此游戏吧。然后设计者麻烦将这个数学题破解一下：纳维-斯托克斯方程存在性与光滑性（Navier-Stokes Existence and Smoothness）
该问题属于流体力学，要求证明三维不可压缩流体的纳维-斯托克斯方程在所有初始条件下是否存在光滑解，或是否可能出现奇异性。

游戏商，设计者能破解这道数学题，再推荐和更新游戏吧。
items.review:

该问题属于流体力学，要求证明三维不可压缩流体的纳维-斯托克斯方程在所有初始条件下是否存在光滑解，或是否可能出现奇异性。

游戏商，设计者能破解这道数学题，再推荐和更新游戏吧。
